title: All about Waff
wikitext:
[]: All about Waff!             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Feb 18, 2008 8:32 am (Thread started on a bizarre whim) All right, all you WAFF fans out there (Especially you, Stardust!), what do you think would be the waffiest thing possible in NGE? Apart from S/A waff, that is. Do you think Sachi WAFF is waffy? Or should there be some Sachi/Shammy waff?

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Mon Feb 18, 2008 11:04 am Pen Pen/Misato WAFF + Vitam C, just passed through my mind....

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Mon Feb 18, 2008 12:31 pm Nothing is more waffy than A/S nut if it had to be something else maybe Misato/Kaji (yes i know its obvious but it works so well), or Rei finding someone, yea if there were someone for Rei and you had the whole romance plot thing in a fanfic that would be prety damned waffy.

[]: Re: All about Waff!             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 18, 2008 1:14 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Or should there be some Sachi/Shammy waff?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 18, 2008 2:21 pm I don't really see WAFF mixing with NGE-played-straight -- its whole take on human nature is anti-WAFF to a very great degree. I don't even see much scope for side-stories, if any of the major characters (down to and including the named bridge bunnies) are involved. I think you need an alternate world with an explanation for OOC-ness (or the introduction of other players into the game who can deal with the hand of damage cases dealt them) and the firmness of purpose to say how it plays though 3rd Impact, otherwise you're just expropriating names and some scenery (which pretty much describes all the official AU material too).

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Mon Feb 18, 2008 3:49 pm Waff only works in fanfics, and on that note whats the best A/S waff fanfic i need some reading.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Mon Feb 18, 2008 3:55 pm It's because Eva is such a dark series that people write WAFF. If EVa was lighter in tone, we would be geting DarkFic instead. My fics always turn out to have WAFFy elements in them. I just can't bring myself to hurt the characters and not make it up to them.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Feb 18, 2008 4:47 pm I'm shocked she hasn't posted here yet. I thought she had sensors for these things...

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Feb 18, 2008 5:39 pm Actually I'd say that Toji/Hikari is the "WAFFiest" thing in Eva, given that they are arguably the most stable "couple" in the entire show, with actual emotional investment in each other. Beyond the "made up" couples, Misato/Kaji is more popular, but is a lot rockier, and it doesn't strike me as particularly warm or fuzzy but chaotic. the more I rewatch the series the more I'm surprised that side characters like Toji and Hikari got as much development as they did, given their relatively smaller amount of screentime. Notice that Toji is supposedly "the dumb jock" but he handles emotionally relating to Hikari, infinitely better than Shinji handles things with Asuka OR Rei. After he realizes Hikari is attracted to him, he actually maturely moves forward with stuff and instead of pulling away, is actually receptive. Similarly, Hikari is supposed to be "the strict class president" but handles personal relationships better than "uber-bitch" Asuka. Sometimes I think their two relationships were intentionally juxtaposed by the writers (that is, have Asuka and Hikari discuss Toji, while Toji and Shinji are...well not really discussing stuff but at least talking about the others). Plus, Episode 17 just has one really funny thing: I mean if in like episode 10 you had said to a new viewer "Hikari is going to worry Rei is trying to steal Toji from her", they really wouldn't have believed it (although it's just Hikari mistaken and the scripting actually works out really well).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 18, 2008 5:48 pm universalperson wrote: If EVa was lighter in tone, we would be geting DarkFic instead.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Mon Feb 18, 2008 6:04 pm May I ask, what is a WAFF?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 18, 2008 6:21 pm http://www.urbandictionary.com/define.php?term=waff

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Mon Feb 18, 2008 6:31 pm Not my speciality then.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 18, 2008 9:27 pm I pretty much agree with what V said. However, in terms of the actual series, it's true that not much can really be WAFFy about it.... But I think that especially after the events of the Bitter End, what with fanworks and such, the characters have a chance of being happy. Anyway, in terms of the most WAFFest thing I actually remember from Eva series-wise, I'd say it's these scenes (I might be forgetting something): ~Shinji, Asuka and Rei sitting together after the Episode 11 blackout ~The Children and Misato eating Ramen together Episode 12 ~Episode 20, Misato's line "Give me back my Shinji-kun!" as she cries ~EoTV Episode 26's final scene. Beautiful how Yui and Gendou stand together in Instrumentality as Shinji thanks everybody. ~EoE 26' Shinji grabbing Rei's hand "Thankyou.", she squeezes it in reply, and then Shinji laying in Rei's lap as she smiles lovingly at him.

[]:             Quote Post by wut_is_a_eva_lol » Mon Feb 18, 2008 9:56 pm mrpanda wrote: Nothing is more waffy than A/S

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Feb 18, 2008 10:27 pm *rimshot* *crickets* (jp, it was cute) SSD, don't forget the Shinji rescues Asuka scene in magma daibaa.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Tue Feb 19, 2008 3:20 am I'd say Touji and Asuka's antics were pretty WAFF...but nothing close to Shinji secretly smiling when Asuka talks about her "hurt pride" in spandex.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Feb 19, 2008 4:57 pm May I ask, what is a WAFF?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 20, 2008 4:42 pm Also, what AyanamiOtaku and ZapX stated. The other WAFFy moment before everything went to hell, like, not even a second afterwards (lol downward spiral): ~"Kisu yo, kisu." Angel-wise: ~Teh cuteness that is Sachi-chan! @ the urbandictionary: LOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOL Ha! I'm in the minority! (My fics on aff dot net REEK of Warm And Fuzzy Feelings mixed with naughtiness!)

[]: Re: All about Waff!             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 20, 2008 5:33 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Or should there be some Sachi/Shammy waff?
